_note: NON-CANONICAL RETRIEVAL AID — 17 final diagrams with real visible labels and structured, explicitly-supported visual relations. Diagrams are additive presentation derived from canonical sections; never doctrine. The historical withdrawn integration diagram (between D13 and D15) is intentionally excluded and not imported.
excluded_note: The withdrawn integration diagram is not imported as an active diagram.
